source: Claude external audit + GPT RM14 completion; strict acceptance criteria; no DONE without live proof

policy.done_rule: DONE = non-null SHA + file > 50 bytes + ast.parse OK for .py + for runtime tasks: codex exit=0 + governance/codex/results/{trace_id}.json exists
policy.stub_rule: File <= 50 bytes or SyntaxError = BLOCKED automatically, not DONE
policy.queue_limit: Next task opens only after previous DONE
policy.report_canon: Telegram: stage X/Y tasks (%), roadmap X/Y stages (%), checklist separate lines, question only if needed. No diff/stdout/JSON/traceback
policy.release_pass: BLOCKED until live E2E receipt + Telegram receipt + Claude external audit PASS

tasks.title: Архив legacy runtime — подтвердить отключение
acceptance: gpt-hosted-roles.yml confirmed ARCHIVED disabled stub
telegram-poll.yml dispatches codex-local.yml
active checked workflows do not contain GEMINI_API_KEY runtime token
codex-local remains canonical active runtime
legacy archive report exists and file > 100 bytes with SHA
tasks.blocker_if: If active Gemini/OpenAI HTTP API/paid hosted runtime appears in production path, RM-14 reopens

tasks.title: Паспорта объектов GD / DIR / WRK
acceptance: governance/architecture/object_passports/GD.json: > 200 bytes, valid JSON, fields id/curator_runner/contours/rule_owner
governance/architecture/object_passports/DIR.json: > 200 bytes, valid JSON, same fields
governance/architecture/object_passports/WRK.json: > 200 bytes, contours contains [WRK-C1, WRK-C2, WRK-C3]
governance/architecture/objects_registry_v2.json: all 3 objects, valid JSON
WRK.json does not contain ANALYSIS_CONTOUR / AUDIT_CONTOUR / EXECUTION_CONTOUR as contours
validator passes
tasks.blocker_if: Any file <= 200 bytes, invalid JSON, or WRK.json contains old erroneous contour fields

tasks.title: Рабочие runner файлы — реальный код, не заглушки
tasks.note: Критический путь. Без рабочих runners система остаётся документами.
acceptance: gd_curator_runner.py: > 300 bytes, ast.parse OK, def main(), reads managed_channel, writes dir_inbox
dir_curator_runner.py: > 300 bytes, ast.parse OK, def main(), reads dir_inbox, writes wrk_inbox
wrk_curator_runner.py: > 300 bytes, ast.parse OK, def main(), selects WRK-Cx and dispatches analyst
executor_stage_runner.py: > 300 bytes, ast.parse OK, def main(), executes task and writes result
auditor_stage_runner.py: > 300 bytes, ast.parse OK, def main(), checks result and writes PASS/FAIL
python3 runner.py exits 0 or graceful no-op for every runner
tasks.blocker_if: Any file <= 50 bytes, SyntaxError, missing def main(), or python3 runner.py throws exception

tasks.title: Live E2E проход одного контура
acceptance: Operator Telegram message triggers GD.CURATOR via codex-local, Codex exit=0, result json exists
GD.CURATOR routes to DIR.CURATOR with receipt
DIR.CURATOR routes to WRK.CURATOR and selects WRK-C1 with receipt
WRK-C1.ANALYST creates plan artifact
WRK-C1.AUDITOR pre-check PASS artifact
WRK-C1.EXECUTOR commits result with non-null commit_sha
WRK-C1.AUDITOR post-check PASS artifact
Operator receives canonical Telegram report with message_id
All 7 Codex receipts stored in governance/codex/results/
tasks.blocker_if: Any stage missing Codex receipt, commit_sha is null, or Telegram message_id missing

release_lock.reason: No live E2E receipt + no working runners + no WRK-C1/C2/C3 contours
release_lock.unlock_after: RM-15 DONE + Claude external audit PASS
